title: Ball Rolling Off Table
description: A blue ball rolls across the top of a table toward the edge while a cloth hangs below part of the table.
ground_truth: The blue ball rolls off the edge of the table and falls toward the ground below.

llm.prediction: The blue ball rolls off the edge of the table and falls through the air toward the ground below.

vision.prediction: A blue ball is launched from the left side and hits the red and white horizontal bar, causing it to vibrate.

world_model.prediction: A blue ball is launched from the left side and hits the red and white horizontal bar, causing it to vibrate.

analysis: The LLM output matches the clip outcome. The vision model and world model both describe a different scene entirely, so they are not accurate for this clip.

title: Box Occlusion
description: A red cube descends into a wooden box-like enclosure with tall wooden walls and becomes partially hidden as it moves down.
ground_truth: The red cube falls until it reaches the bottom of the wooden enclosure and comes to rest.

llm.prediction: The red cube continues descending until it reaches the bottom of the wooden box and comes to rest.

vision.prediction: The door closes, and the blue cube is no longer visible from the camera's perspective.

world_model.prediction: The door closes, and the blue cube is no longer visible from the camera's perspective.

analysis: The LLM output is consistent with the clip: the cube settles at the bottom of the box. The vision and world model outputs refer to a blue cube and a closing door, which do not match the actual scene.

title: Camera Solidity
description: A red ball approaches an upright wooden barrier in its path.
ground_truth: The red ball reaches the wooden barrier and bounces back rather than passing through it.

llm.prediction: The red ball strikes the wooden barrier and bounces back in the opposite direction.

vision.prediction: The red ball rolls towards the right, and the wooden structure moves to the left, revealing the ball behind it.

world_model.prediction: The red ball rolls towards the right, and the wooden structure moves to the left, revealing the ball behind it.

analysis: The LLM output captures the solidity interaction correctly. The vision and world model outputs instead describe the ball being revealed by a moving structure, which is a different event from the barrier collision shown in the clip.

title: Falling Flat Collision
description: A large crate falls toward a platform where a smaller brick block is already resting.
ground_truth: The crate lands on the brick block sitting on top of the platform, colliding with them in a physically normal way.

llm.prediction: The crate lands on the platform and the brick block, compressing or displacing the block upon impact.

vision.prediction: The wooden crate will fall onto the brick and crush it, then the crate will settle on the white platform.

world_model.prediction: The wooden crate will fall onto the brick and crush it, then the crate will settle on the white platform.

analysis: All three outputs point to the same overall outcome: the falling crate lands on the smaller block and platform. The LLM stays closest to the exact scene wording, while the vision and world model outputs are slightly more specific about the block being crushed.

title: Hot Air Balloon Continuity
description: Several hot air balloons move across the scene, with one balloon partly occluded by another as the motion continues.
ground_truth: The hot air balloons move up and down, and the ball inside the hot air balloon disappears and reappears as the motion continues.

llm.prediction: The hot air balloons continue drifting across the sky, with the occluded balloon emerging from behind the other as they move in their respective directions.

vision.prediction: The hot air balloons continue to move in a circular motion, with the baskets remaining stationary on the ground.

world_model.prediction: The hot air balloons continue to move in a circular motion, with the baskets remaining stationary on the ground.

analysis: The LLM output matches the visible continuity in the clip. The vision and world model outputs introduce motion patterns and stationary baskets that are not supported by the scene.

title: Moving Occluder (Easy)
description: A wooden panel moves across the scene and temporarily blocks a blue cube with a small red object on top.
ground_truth: The camera moves and passes the panel hiding the blue and red cube and reveals the blue cube and red object again moving back to original positions and the cubes stay still.

llm.prediction: The wooden panel continues moving across the scene, revealing the blue cube and red object as it passes by them.

vision.prediction: The wooden box will continue to rotate, revealing more of the desert landscape behind it as it turns.

world_model.prediction: The wooden box will continue to rotate, revealing more of the desert landscape behind it as it turns.

analysis: The LLM output correctly tracks the occluder clearing the object. The vision and world model outputs again describe a different scene involving a rotating box in the desert.

title: Moving Occluder (Hard)
description: A large wooden panel temporarily blocks two background objects: a light-colored cylinder and a dark rounded object.
ground_truth: The camera moves past the wooden panel and then comes back to the original position. While this movement happens and the wooden panel hides the objects, the objects switch positions with each other.

llm.prediction: The wooden panel continues moving across the scene, exposing the light-colored cylinder and dark rounded object as it clears past them.

vision.prediction: The wooden board is expected to continue its fall and eventually land on the ground in the desert.

world_model.prediction: The wooden board is expected to continue its fall and eventually land on the ground in the desert.

analysis: The LLM output matches the reveal at the end of the clip. The vision and world model outputs do not match the objects or motion shown here.

title: Rotating Cup Reveal (Easy)
description: A teacup rotates on a saucer, alternately revealing a blue object and a dark rectangular object inside.
ground_truth: There are 2 teacups that rotate during the clip. The teacup on the left has a blue object inside. During the rotation, the blue object isn't always visible but it remains inside the teacup and is revealed again when the teacup rotates back.

llm.prediction: The teacup continues rotating on the saucer, alternately revealing and concealing the blue object and dark rectangular object inside as it spins.

vision.prediction: The two bowls will continue to rotate in place, showing different parts of their designs and the changing reflections of the sky.

world_model.prediction: The two bowls will continue to rotate in place, showing different parts of their designs and the changing reflections of the sky.

analysis: All three outputs capture continued rotation, but the LLM stays accurate to the single teacup and the hidden objects inside it. The vision and world model outputs describe the scene more loosely as two bowls with visual reflections.

title: Rotating Cup Reveal (Hard)
description: A teacup rotates on a saucer in a desert-like setting, alternately revealing a pink object and a dark rectangular object inside.
ground_truth: There are 2 teacups that rotate during the clip. The teacup on the left has a pink object inside. During the rotation, the pink object isn't  visible and switches positions during the rotation from left teacup to right teacup.

llm.prediction: The teacup continues rotating on the saucer, alternately revealing and concealing the pink object and dark rectangular object inside as it spins.

vision.prediction: The red ball is released from the left cup and is about to be caught by the right cup.

world_model.prediction: The red ball is released from the left cup and is about to be caught by the right cup.

analysis: The LLM output matches the clip's continuing cup rotation. The vision and world model outputs describe a cup-to-cup transfer with a red ball that is not present in this scene.

title: Stacked Blocks Tower
description: A tall scaffold-like tower supports hanging striped panels and nearby platforms.
ground_truth: The camera shows a platfrom and then rotates to show a tower structure with hanging striped panels. A blue ball is dropped from the air and drops on the platform. The ball is hidden by the striped panels and the tower structure remains standing.

llm.prediction: The tower structure remains standing as it is, with the hanging striped panels and platforms continuing to be supported by the scaffold framework.

vision.prediction: The colorful fabric continues to hang on the metal frame, swaying gently in the wind. The scene remains static, with no significant changes or movements.

world_model.prediction: The colorful fabric continues to hang on the metal frame, swaying gently in the wind. The scene remains static, with no significant changes or movements.

analysis: All three outputs are directionally consistent that the structure remains standing. The LLM is the most faithful to the scaffold scene, while the vision and world model outputs describe the hanging fabric more generally.
